scripts.docker:nuke: docker compose -f orders-bullmq-docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f orders-bullmq-docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --build
scripts.pm2:start: docker compose -f orders-bullmq-docker/docker-compose.yml exec app npx pm2 start pm2.json
scripts.pm2:stop: docker compose -f orders-bullmq-docker/docker-compose.yml exec app npx pm2 stop pm2.json
scripts.pm2:list: docker compose -f orders-bullmq-docker/docker-compose.yml exec app npx pm2 list
scripts.pm2:logs: docker compose -f orders-bullmq-docker/docker-compose.yml exec app npx pm2 logs
scripts.pm2:restart: docker compose -f orders-bullmq-docker/docker-compose.yml exec app npx pm2 restart pm2.json
